mapper.select:
select cs.station_id , cs.station_name , cs.address , cs.latitude , cs.longitude , cs.operator_name , cs.open_time , cs.close_time , cs.station_status , cs.created_at , cs.updated_at , count(c.charger_id) as charger_count , coalesce( sum( case when c.status = '사용가능' then 1 else 0 end ), 0 ) as available_charger_count
from charging_station cs
left join charger c on cs.station_id = c.station_id
where 1 = 1
and ( cs.station_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or cs.address like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or cs.operator_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
group by cs.station_id , cs.station_name , cs.address , cs.latitude , cs.longitude , cs.operator_name , cs.open_time , cs.close_time , cs.station_status , cs.created_at , cs.updated_at
order by cs.station_id desc

select station_id , station_name , address , latitude , longitude , operator_name , open_time , close_time , station_status , created_at , updated_at from charging_station where station_id = #{stationId}

select charger_id , station_id , charger_name , charger_type , connector_type , charging_speed_kw , price_per_kwh , status , created_at , updated_at from charger where station_id = #{stationId} order by charger_id asc

select cs.station_id , cs.station_name , cs.address , cs.operator_name , cs.station_status , cs.latitude , cs.longitude , count(c.charger_id) as charger_count , coalesce( sum( case when c.status = '사용가능' then 1 else 0 end ), 0 ) as available_charger_count from charging_station cs left join charger c on cs.station_id = c.station_id where 1=1
and ( cs.station_name ilike '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or cs.address ilike '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or cs.operator_name ilike '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
group by cs.station_id , cs.station_name , cs.address , cs.operator_name , cs.station_status , cs.latitude , cs.longitude order by cs.station_id desc
